prose:
A frontier-orbitals calculation was performed on ethylene using density functional theory (DFT) with the tier 'standard' method (B3LYP functional, def2-TZVP basis set, with density fitting) in the gas phase. The calculation was a single-point energy evaluation on the user-provided geometry, for the neutral singlet state (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The PySCF program was used, and the SCF calculation converged successfully. No warnings were reported.

The resulting frontier orbital energies are:
HOMO: -7.6156 eV
LUMO: -0.17987 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap: 7.4357 eV
